title: Bedsure Fleece Throw Blanket for Bed - Soft Cosy Fluffy Blankets for Sofa, Warm Double Throws for Audlts, Black, 150x200 cm
features: AWARD-WINNING SOFTNESS: Winner of the 2025 Good Housekeeping Best Bedding Award, this fluffy throw blanket is crafted from 100% premium microfibre polyester for irresistibly soft comfort. Its plush texture cocoons you in warmth—perfect as a throw blanket for sofa or a bed blanket for a cosy night's sleep

EXTRA WARMTH, ALL YEAR ROUND: This fleece blanket locks in heat, making it an ideal warm throw blanket for chilly nights while staying breathable enough for year-round comfort. Perfect as a large blanket to share or a stylish sofa throw

CERTIFIED SAFE FOR PEACE OF MIND: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 24.HCN.19195 Hohenstein certified to be free from harmful substances, making this cosy throw blanket safe for babies, those with sensitive skin, and the whole family. Enjoy the pure comfort of a soft blanket with confidence
LONG-LASTING & HASSLE-FREE: Built to last with anti-pilling properties, ensuring it stays as good as new. Machine washable at 40°C for easy upkeep, so you can enjoy effortless warmth without the fuss

A THOUGHTFUL GIFT FOR EVERY OCCASION: Whether for holidays, birthdays, or housewarmings, this ultra-soft throw blanket makes a meaningful gift. Its blend of warmth, elegance, and comfort ensures your loved ones feel cherished with this perfect fleece blanket, no matter the season
